meta.description: IBA rules govern World Championship and Olympic amateur boxing. Only senior (elite) divisions compete at this level. Headgear is not required for elite men — removed to align with professional standards. Olympic bouts use computerised scoring to reduce judge influence; World Championships use standard 10-point must scoring.

circuitRules.description: IBA elite senior rules for World Championships. No headgear. Standard 10-point must scoring with five ringside judges.

IBA/IOC elite senior rules for the Olympic Games. No headgear. Computerised scoring system used to reduce the influence of individual judge decisions and increase scoring transparency under broadcast conditions.
